name: update_environment_variable
description: Update the value of an existing environment variable for a Render service. The service will automatically redeploy with the new value if auto-deploy is enabled. Use this to rotate secrets, update connection strings, or change configuration without modifying code.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: The service ID that owns the environment variable.

parameters.name: envVarKey
parameters.description: The key (name) of the environment variable to update (e.g., 'DATABASE_URL').

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The new value for the environment variable.
